title: Spring Boot API Foundation
description: Bootstrap the Spring Boot project, define the Task entity, and configure the H2 in-memory database.

title: REST API Endpoints (CRUD)
description: Implement TaskController with full CRUD: GET /tasks, GET /tasks/{id}, POST /tasks, PUT /tasks/{id}, DELETE /tasks/{id}.

title: Validation & Error Handling
description: Add Bean Validation to the Task DTO. Implement a GlobalExceptionHandler returning structured JSON error responses.

title: React Frontend Integration
description: Build a minimal React frontend that consumes the API via Axios — displays task list, allows create/update/delete.

title: Advanced Features & Testing
description: Add task filtering, priority sorting, due date alerts, and write integration tests with Spring Boot Test.
